summary: Completed testing of Iteration 6 features: Manual Pricing UI in Billing page, Contract PDF Extraction UI, and Trip Management Filters. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint working
Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Get clients endpoint working
Backend: Get duty slips endpoint working
Backend: Create manual pricing invoice - all itemized fields (base_fare, toll, parking, driver_allowance, extras, custom_items) correctly saved
Backend: PDF extraction endpoint exists and validates input
Backend: PDF extraction with sample URL - endpoint responds correctly
Backend: Get duties endpoint working with required fields for filtering
Backend: Get drivers endpoint working for filter dropdown
Backend: Get contracts endpoint working
Backend: Contract structure supports vehicle rate cards and fixed routes
Backend: Get invoices endpoint working
Backend: Invoice creation supports manual pricing fields
Frontend: Billing page loads without errors
Frontend: Generate Invoice modal opens correctly
Frontend: 'No Contract (Manual Pricing)' option visible in contract dropdown
Frontend: 'Enable itemized manual pricing' checkbox visible and clickable
Frontend: Manual Pricing Breakdown section appears when checkbox is checked and duty slip selected
Frontend: All manual pricing input fields present (Base Fare, Toll Charges, Parking Charges, Driver Allowance, Other Extras)
Frontend: Custom Items section with '+ Add Custom Item' button present
Frontend: Subtotal (Before GST) calculates correctly (₹2,100 for test values)
Frontend: Contract Management page loads without errors
Frontend: 'Import from Quotation PDF' section visible in Create Contract modal
Frontend: PDF URL input field present and accepts input
Frontend: 'Extract Rates' button visible and enabled
Frontend: Vehicle Rate Cards section present
Frontend: Fixed Routes section present
Frontend: Extra Charges Configuration section present
Frontend: Trip Management page loads without errors
Frontend: Quick filters present (All Trips, Today's Trips, Ongoing, Unassigned, Completed Today, Upcoming)
Frontend: Status filter dropdown working
Frontend: Company filter dropdown working
Frontend: Search input working
Frontend: Sort dropdown working
Frontend: 'More Filters' button with active filter count badge
Frontend: 'Clear All' button to reset filters
Frontend: Quick filters correctly filter trips (Unassigned shows 13 CREATED trips, Ongoing shows 0, Today shows 0)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_features.py (created new test file for iteration 6 features)
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice with manual pricing during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 6 features are fully functional. Key features tested: 1) Manual Pricing UI in Billing page - shows when 'No Contract' is selected and 'Enable itemized manual pricing' checkbox is checked, includes Base Fare, Toll, Parking, Driver Allowance, Extras, and Custom Items fields with live subtotal calculation. 2) Contract PDF Extraction - 'Import from Quotation PDF' section in Create Contract modal with PDF URL input and 'Extract Rates' button that uses emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. 3) Trip Management Filters - Quick filters (All, Today, Ongoing, Unassigned, Completed Today, Upcoming), Status/Company/Driver dropdowns, Search input, Sort dropdown, and More Filters panel with date range.

manual_pricing_ui.trigger: Select 'No Contract (Manual Pricing)' + check 'Enable itemized manual pricing' + select duty slip

contract_pdf_extraction.location: Contract Management page > Create Contract modal
